The expression of 4 major cytotoxic genes GZMA, GZMB, PRF1, and NKG7, which are known to be abundant in CD4 CTLs (32,36), increased along the latter half of pseudotime in a similar manner between CD4 and CD8 CTLs; however, the expression of 2 other major cytotoxic genes, GZMH and GNLY, showed slightly different patterns for CD4 and CD8 CTLs (Fig. 5F and SI Appendix, Fig. S6G).
